# SkyWyo

> SkyWyo is a drone real estate media company based in Cheyenne and Laramie, Wyoming, serving real estate listings across the whole state. We shoot edited aerial photos and short listing videos that show the land, acreage, and views that ground-level photos miss, then deliver them MLS-ready within 48 hours. FAA Part 107 certified and Wyoming owned and operated.

## Services

- Aerial Real Estate Photo Set: High-resolution, color-corrected aerial stills of the house, the acreage, and the approach, sized for MLS and web.
- 60-Second Listing Video: One branded aerial cut for MLS, YouTube, and social, with the agent's name and brokerage on the end card.
- 48-Hour Turnaround: Footage delivered to the agent's inbox within two days of the shoot.
- Add-ons: twilight set, vertical social cuts, neighborhood and lifestyle reels, and ground-level exterior coverage on larger listings.

## Who It's For

Real estate agents listing properties across Wyoming, especially acreage, land, and rural listings where the property's value is in the land and ground-level photos cannot show it.

## Service Area

Based in Cheyenne and Laramie. Serves real estate listings statewide across Wyoming.

## Credentials

- FAA Part 107 certified commercial drone operation.
- Flying an FAA-registered aircraft within federal airspace rules.
- Wyoming owned and operated.

## Offer and Pricing

- First shoot is free, with no contract and no deposit. The agent decides whether to keep working with SkyWyo after seeing the footage.
- Sky Pro: $349. Edited aerial photo set plus a 60-second branded listing video, delivered in 48 hours.
- Sky Elite: $649. Sky Pro plus ground-level exteriors and social cuts, for larger listings.
- Sky Monthly: $999/month retainer for agents with consistent listing volume (priority scheduling, up to four shoots a month).
- Payment can be made at booking, or at closing on Pro and Elite for a small premium.

## How It Works

1. The agent sends the listing address. SkyWyo confirms a flight window within one business day.
2. SkyWyo flies and shoots the property on a suitable weather day.
3. Footage is edited and delivered MLS-ready within 48 hours.

## Contact

- Website: https://skywyo.com
- Email: info@skywyo.com
- Based in: Cheyenne and Laramie, Wyoming
- Service area: statewide Wyoming

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does drone real estate photography cost in Cheyenne and Laramie?
A: The first shoot is free. After that, a standard package (Sky Pro) is $349 and includes an edited aerial photo set plus a 60-second branded listing video, delivered in 48 hours. Larger listings and add-ons are quoted on top.

Q: How fast will I get the photos and video?
A: 48 hours from the shoot to the agent's inbox, edited and MLS-ready, so the listing can go live with the footage instead of weeks later.

Q: Is SkyWyo FAA certified?
A: Yes. SkyWyo is an FAA Part 107 certified commercial drone operation flying an FAA-registered aircraft within federal airspace rules.

Q: Do you shoot land and acreage, or only the house?
A: Acreage is where aerial matters most. SkyWyo captures the land, the views, and the approach that ground-level photos leave out, which is the part buyers are paying for on a rural Wyoming listing.

Q: What areas of Wyoming does SkyWyo serve?
A: SkyWyo is based in Cheyenne and Laramie and serves real estate listings across the whole state of Wyoming.

Q: Do I have to sign a contract or pay anything upfront?
A: No. The first shoot is free, with no contract and no deposit. The agent decides whether to keep working with SkyWyo after seeing the footage.
